description: RAG Web Browser Worker - Search Google and extract web page content for LLM processing. Enter a search query or a URL of a specific web page to scrape

properties.title: Search term or URL
properties.name: query
properties.description: Enter Google Search keywords or a URL of a specific web page to scrape

properties.title: Maximum results
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: The maximum number of top organic Google Search results whose web pages will be extracted. If query is a URL, this field is ignored.

properties.title: Output formats
properties.name: outputFormats
properties.description: Select one or more formats to which the target web pages will be extracted.

properties.title: Request timeout
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: The maximum time in seconds available for the request, including querying Google Search and scraping the target web pages.

properties.title: SERP max retries
properties.name: serpMaxRetries
properties.description: The maximum number of times the worker will retry fetching Google Search results on error.

properties.title: Select a scraping tool
properties.name: scrapingTool
properties.description: Select a scraping tool for extracting the target web pages.

properties.title: Target page max retries
properties.name: maxRequestRetries
properties.description: The maximum number of times the worker will retry loading the target web page on error.

properties.title: Target page dynamic content timeout
properties.name: dynamicContentWaitSecs
properties.description: The maximum time in seconds to wait for dynamic page content to load.

properties.title: Remove cookie warnings
properties.name: removeCookieWarnings
properties.description: If enabled, the worker attempts to close or remove cookie consent dialogs to improve the quality of extracted text.

properties.title: HTML transformer
properties.name: htmlTransformer
properties.description: Specify how to transform the HTML to extract meaningful content.

properties.title: Readable text character threshold
properties.name: readableTextCharThreshold
properties.description: If readable text is shorter than this value, the worker falls back to the cleaned HTML.

properties.title: Remove HTML elements (CSS selector)
properties.name: removeElementsCssSelector
properties.description: A CSS selector matching HTML elements that will be removed from the DOM before converting to text or Markdown.
properties.default:
nav, footer, script, style, noscript, svg, img[src^='data:'],
[role="alert"],
[role="banner"],
[role="dialog"],
[role="alertdialog"],
[role="region"][aria-label*="skip" i],
[aria-modal="true"]

properties.title: Enable debug mode
properties.name: debugMode
properties.description: If enabled, the worker emits debug logs.
